items.title: Does Mastercard's Expense Increase Reflect a Strategic Long-Term Focus?
items.description: MA's rising costs weigh on margins, but investments in tech, security and new payment flows target long-term growth.

items.title: PayPal: A Buy, But With A Huge Caveat (Rating Upgrade)
items.description: PayPal Holdings, Inc. cautious Buy: attractive 11x earnings valuation, BNPL/Venmo growth, and ecosystem reinvention despite competition. Click for this PYPL update.
